evidence_quotes.quote: publishers being able to completely strip away such experiences after they've already been paid for by the customer

paragraphs.text: Video games are an important and valuable medium, they have helped the creators express their ideas, tell stories, connect with others and they've helped the players themselves immerse themselves into stories better than any other available medium, they can teach, entertain or simply be a bridge to connect with others of similar thinking. The digital fairness act does not address the current issue of publishers being able to completely strip away such experiences after they've already been paid for by the customer, it is a gross violation of consumer rights and needs to be addressed and corrected for as soon as possible in order to prevent such media being deleted permanently.
